title: bumelia brandegeei
intro: Bumelia brandegeei, also known as the Desert Bumelia or Brandegee's Bumelia, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bumelia brandegeei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bumelia brandegeei are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
